zh.{Blddn ap Cnfn: 印尼努薩 騰格阿拉 帖木兒莫 騰加 武塔拉阿普
zh.Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Wales: 威爾士梅利奧爾南瑙 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannau於大約1167年出生在威爾士梅利奧爾南瑙 霍爾時，他的父親Cynwrig ap Rhiwallon Lord of Maelor Gymraeg128歲，母親Efa verch Madog of Wales49歲。他和Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyr至少有1個兒子。他去世於1250年享年84歲。

zh-hans.{Blddn ap Cnfn: 印度尼西亚努薩 騰格阿拉 帖木兒莫 騰加 武塔拉阿普
zh-hans.Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Wales: 威尔士梅利奧爾南瑙 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannau于大约1167年出生在威尔士梅利奧爾南瑙 霍爾时，他的父亲Cynwrig ap Rhiwallon Lord of Maelor Gymraeg128岁，母亲Efa verch Madog of Wales49岁。他和Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyr至少有1个儿子。他去世于1250年享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .
English: variant of   Pape   1.

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French Canadian: variant of   Madore  .

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .
English: variant of   Pape   1.

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Cadwgon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Welsh:  see  Cadogan  .

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot.

Welsh (Pembrokeshire and Glamorgan) and Irish (of Welsh origin): from the Old Welsh personal name Catgucaun, Catguocawn, modernized as Cadwgon. It is composed of cad ‘battle’ + gogawn ‘honour, glory’. See also Wogan . The surname is stressed, like its Welsh original, on the penultimate syllable, hence its occasional development to Duggan .
Irish: from Ó Ceadagáin ‘descendant of Ceadagán’.

nameMeanings.name: Meurig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Mauricius via Old Welsh Mouric. See Maurice .

variants.name: Meuric
meanings: From Latin Mauricius via Old Welsh Mouric. See Maurice .

en.lifeSummary: When Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannau was born about 1167, in Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Wales, his father, Cynwrig ap Rhiwallon Lord of Maelor Gymraeg, was 128 and his mother, Efa verch Madog of Wales, was 49. He had at least 1 son with Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyr. He died in 1250, at the age of 84.

fr.{Blddn ap Cnfn: Ap, Timor Tengah Utara, Nusa Tenggara Timur, Indonésie
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannau est né environ 1167, à Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Galles, son père, Cynwrig ap Rhiwallon Lord of Maelor Gymraeg, avait 128 ans et sa mère, Efa verch Madog of Wales, avait 49 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyr. Il est décédé en 1250, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.{Blddn ap Cnfn: Ap, Timor Tengah Utara, Nusa Tenggara Timur, Indonesien
de.lifeSummary: Als Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannau um 1167 in Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cynwrig ap Rhiwallon Lord of Maelor Gymraeg 128 und seine Mutter Efa verch Madog of Wales 49. Er hatte mit Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyr mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1250 im Alter von 84 Jahren.

it.{Blddn ap Cnfn: Ap, Timor Tengah Utara, Nusa Tenggara Timur, Indonesia
it.lifeSummary: Quando Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannau è nato il circa 1167 nel Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Galles, il suo padre, Cynwrig ap Rhiwallon Lord of Maelor Gymraeg, aveva 128 anni e il suo madre, Efa verch Madog of Wales, aveva 49 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyr. Morì nel 1250, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.{Blddn ap Cnfn: インドネシアヌサ テングガーア ティムルティモー テンガ ウターアアップ
ja.Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Wales: ウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアナナウ ハル
ja.lifeSummary: Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannauが約1167年にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアナナウ ハルで生まれた時，父Cynwrig ap Rhiwallon Lord of Maelor Gymraegは128歳，母Efa verch Madog of Walesは49歳であった。彼はGwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyrとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1250年に84歳で死去した。

ko.{Blddn ap Cnfn: 인도네시아 누사 텐가아 팀어 팀어 텐가 우타라 아프
ko.lifeSummary: Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannau(이)가 대략 1167년 웨일스 머이오네스실르 나나 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cynwrig ap Rhiwallon Lord of Maelor Gymraeg(은)는 128세였고, 그의 어머니 Efa verch Madog of Wales(은)는 49세였다. 그는 Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyr(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1250년 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.{Blddn ap Cnfn: Ap, Timor Tengah Utara, Nusa Tenggara Timur, Indonésia
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannau nasceu aproximadamente 1167, em Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Gales, seu pai, Cynwrig ap Rhiwallon Lord of Maelor Gymraeg, tinha 128 anos e sua mãe, Efa verch Madog of Wales, tinha 49 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyr. Ele faleceu em 1250, com 84 anos.

ro.{Blddn ap Cnfn: Ap, Timor Tengah Utara, Nusa Tenggara Timur, Indonezia

ru.{Blddn ap Cnfn: ап, тимор тенгах утара, нуса тенгара тимур, Индонезия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannau родился около 1167 г. в местности наннау холл, мириоунетшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Cynwrig ap Rhiwallon Lord of Maelor Gymraeg было 128 лет, а матери, которую звали Efa verch Madog of Wales, 49. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyr. Он умер в 1250 г. в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Meurig ap Madog ap Cadwgon Lord of Nannau nació aproximadamente 1167, en Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Gales, su papá, Cynwrig ap Rhiwallon Lord of Maelor Gymraeg, tenía 128 años y su mamá, Efa verch Madog of Wales, tenía 49 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Gwenllian ferch Iorwerth ap Predyr. Murió en 1250, a la edad de 84 años.
